name: @chatkit/core
description: Chat engine: scope-typed threads (order/inquiry/salon-pair) with a policy deciding who chats with whom, send pipeline persist → realtime → presence-miss → notifier, unread counts, system messages, per-sender rate limiting. Seams: ThreadStore, MessageStore, RealtimeLike, PresenceLike, NotifierLike (matches @notifykit/core by shape). Zero dependencies.
